© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc. I www.ProductLaunchFormula.com
Key Takeaways:
• Module 7 is all about Evergreen product launches. The earlier modules were all
about discovering your story and learning how to tell it in a very compelling way.
• My earliest success in online business came in stock trading. I created charts of
historical markets - I had no access to resources or stats.
• I only had access to one statistic, and that was visitor count - this led to me
discovering my audience was more interested in bear markets than bull markets.
From this I learned a key lesson: Tailor what you do to what the market is actually
interested in.
• This has been the source of much of my success. PLF is all about that conversation
and connecting with that market.
• With Evergreen you can build all the lessons into your business full-time. This is
advanced stuff and you should learn/implement everything in the previous
modules first.
• Make sure you do a regular launch first and don’t jump straight into Evergreen.
Take the work you do in your launches and turn it into an Evergreen business
model, that’s how you take PLF to the next level.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc. I www.ProductLaunchFormula.com
So now we’re going to talk about Evergreen Product Launches. You may have
noticed that I sold you a course on product launches, but I sort of had this evil plan to
completely change the face of your marketing and even your business. Really that was
about connection, connection with your marketplace. It’s sort of about telling your story,
actually discovering your story.
If you look back at those early modules, discovering what your story is of your
business and yourself in the market and showing you how to tell that story in a very
compelling way that helps you connect with your market and connect with what they
really are looking for from you, what they really want and what they really need.
My philosophy and what I’ve been teaching is very much about consistently
identifying what your market wants and needs and then giving it to them. Now, my
earliest success online came when I was publishing about the stock market.
You can see my fancy chart here, I was publishing about the stock market and I
was a bit of a market historian, so I created these charts of bear markets and bull
markets. So, this is a bull market where it’s going up, and a bear market is where it’s
going down. So I created these charts of these historical markets and this is so long ago I
didn’t even have access to any stats, there weren’t any keyword tools or anything, I didn’t
realize that people were way more interested in bear markets then they were in bull
markets.
They had these stupid little counters that you could put on the bottom of your
page, it looks like a little odometer on your car and it showed you had 57 visitors. You
could watch that over time and I started to notice that the bear markets were way more
interested in that. So, what I did was I started publishing a lot more charts and a lot
more stuff about bear markets and I got a lot more traffic and a lot more interest.
That was the very first inkling that I thought, “Wow, I could just tailor whatever I
do to whatever the market is interested in.” That’s really been the source of all my
success. So, basically I think you should never bring something to market unless you
know the market wants it. That’s really what a big part of Product Launch Formula is
about, it’s that conversation and learning how to connect with your market.
Beyond that, I taught you how to do launches, but now with evergreen you’re
going to see how basically you can take those launch tactics and strategies and go from
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc. I www.ProductLaunchFormula.com
PLF being something that you do once to bring a product to market or that you do a
couple times a year, to something that you can actually bake right into your business so
you’re using all those tactics, all those tools, all those triggers, and you’re using it all the
time. So now it goes from being a launch to being an entire business model.
That’s what we’re talking about with evergreen, that’s why it’s really exciting
stuff. There’s some awesomely cool stuff you can do with this. There’s also some things
you’ve got to watch out for and that’s what these videos are all about.
One thing I want to mention is that this is advanced stuff, this isn’t where you
should be starting with Product Launch Formula. If you just happen to skip all those first
five modules and came right into the evergreen material, you’ve got to go back. You’ve
got to go back and go through the standard Product Launch Formula stuff before this
stuff will start to make sense. You can’t shortcut it.
Another thing you don’t want to do is when you actually go to implement these
things, you want to do a regular launch first. You don’t want to ump straight into
evergreen, because there’s going to be a lot of lessons learned that you’re going to take
from your launch and go into evergreen.
You can definitely reuse a lot of your material, so it’s not like you’re reinventing
the wheel. That’s the really cool thing about this, with the evergreen you can basically
take the work you have done and now you turn it into an ongoing business model.
So, this is really cool. It’s very exciting stuff. I think you’re going to love it and I
think it’s going to do great things for your business.
